Petition For An Order Of Issuance Of Citation To Appear And Account For Decedent'S Property;And For An Order To Surrender Decedent'S Property To Executor.
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Cullen for Executor. Jeffrey Lowenthal for Micheal Keighran.

Mr. Cullen stated that the refinancing could not be accomplished, that Mr. Lowenthal will file a petition to partition for sale and continue to look into further financing or the possibility of Tenants in Common. Mr. Cullen also stated that he was getting cooperation and that he was withdrawing his petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Bloom.

Petition For An Order Of Issuance Of Citation To Appear And Account For Decedent'S Property;And For An Order To Surrender Decedent'S Property To Executor.
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Continued To Jan-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Cullen for Catherine Levitt. Edward Smith for Micheal Keighran (Respondent).

Mr. Cullen stated that they have an agreement to obtain the accounting by January 14, 2011, that they did not need the citation, and that they agreed to continue the Petition to Turn Over Property to January 25, 2011. Counsel also agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 23, 2010. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Janauary 20, 2011. The pending petition was continued to January 25, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a status conference.

Judge: Monica Wiley. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
